Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint; Declaration Of Justin M. Marvisi
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT 10 GLENDALE, LP, GENERAL PARTNER E, LLC, GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint; Declaration Of Justin M. Marvisi is GRANTED with final leave to amend to allege fact, not conclusions to support (1) punitive damages (2) against corporate defendants. Conclusory statements (e.g, "inadequate steps," "done with intent," etc) and allegations on "information and belief" without any facts regarding the information that caused the belief are insufficient.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS 10 GLENDALE, LP, GENERAL PARTNER E, LLC AND GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts in support of malice, oppression or fraud with requisite particularity as to the corporate defendants.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
